name: Sales Invoice Summary
Purchase Receipts Summary
report_script:
columns=[
{"fieldname":"purchase_receipt","label":"Purchase Receipt","fieldtype":"Link","options":"Purchase Receipt","width":200},
{"fieldname":"posting_date","label":"Posting Date","fieldtype":"Date","width":130},
{"fieldname":"supplier","label":"Supplier","fieldtype":"Link","options":"Supplier","width":290},
{"fieldname":"supplier_group","label":"Supplier Group","fieldtype":"Link","options":"Supplier Group","width":240},
{"fieldname":"net_total","label":"Net Total","fieldtype":"Currency","width":150},
{"fieldname":"tax_amount","label":"Tax Amount","fieldtype":"Currency","width":140},
{"fieldname":"grand_total","label":"Grand Total","fieldtype":"Currency","width":150}
]

conditions=["pr.docstatus=1","pr.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s"]

params={
    "from_date":filters.get("from_date"),
    "to_date":filters.get("to_date")
}

if filters.get("supplier"):
    conditions.append("pr.supplier=%(supplier)s")
    params["supplier"]=filters.get("supplier")

if filters.get("supplier_group"):
    conditions.append("s.supplier_group=%(supplier_group)s")
    params["supplier_group"]=filters.get("supplier_group")

if filters.get("net_total"):
    conditions.append("ROUND(pr.net_total)=ROUND(%(net_total)s)")
    params["net_total"]=filters.get("net_total")

if filters.get("tax_amount"):
    conditions.append("ROUND(pr.total_taxes_and_charges)=ROUND(%(tax_amount)s)")
    params["tax_amount"]=filters.get("tax_amount")

if filters.get("grand_total"):
    conditions.append("ROUND(pr.grand_total)=ROUND(%(grand_total)s)")
    params["grand_total"]=filters.get("grand_total")

data=frappe.db.sql(f"""
SELECT
    pr.name purchase_receipt,
    pr.posting_date,
    pr.supplier,
    s.supplier_group,
    pr.net_total,
    pr.total_taxes_and_charges tax_amount,
    pr.grand_total
FROM `tabPurchase Receipt` pr
LEFT JOIN `tabSupplier` s
    ON s.name=pr.supplier
WHERE {' AND '.join(conditions)}
ORDER BY pr.posting_date DESC,pr.name DESC
""",params,as_dict=True)

report_summary=[
{"label":"Net Total","value":sum(d.net_total for d in data),"datatype":"Currency"},
{"label":"Tax Amount","value":sum(d.tax_amount for d in data),"datatype":"Currency"},
{"label":"Grand Total","value":sum(d.grand_total for d in data),"datatype":"Currency"}
]

data=(columns,data,None,None,report_summary,1)
javascript: frappe.query_reports["Purchase Receipts Summary"]={filters:[{fieldname:"supplier_group",label:"Supplier Group",fieldtype:"Link",options:"Supplier Group"},{fieldname:"supplier",label:"Supplier",fieldtype:"Link",options:"Supplier"},{fieldname:"net_total",label:"Find Net Total",fieldtype:"Currency"},{fieldname:"tax_amount",label:"Find Tax Amount",fieldtype:"Currency"},{fieldname:"grand_total",label:"Find Grand Total",fieldtype:"Currency"},{fieldname:"from_date",label:"From Date",fieldtype:"Date",default:frappe.datetime.year_start(),reqd:1},{fieldname:"to_date",label:"To Date",fieldtype:"Date",default:frappe.datetime.get_today(),reqd:1}]};

name: Purchase Invoice Summary
report_script:
columns=[
{"fieldname":"purchase_invoice","label":"Purchase Invoice","fieldtype":"Link","options":"Purchase Invoice","width":200},
{"fieldname":"posting_date","label":"Posting Date","fieldtype":"Date","width":130},
{"fieldname":"supplier","label":"Supplier","fieldtype":"Link","options":"Supplier","width":300},
{"fieldname":"supplier_group","label":"Supplier Group","fieldtype":"Link","options":"Supplier Group","width":250},
{"fieldname":"net_total","label":"Net Total","fieldtype":"Currency","width":150},
{"fieldname":"tax_amount","label":"Tax Amount","fieldtype":"Currency","width":130},
{"fieldname":"grand_total","label":"Grand Total","fieldtype":"Currency","width":150}
]

conditions=["pi.docstatus=1","pi.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s"]

params={
    "from_date":filters.get("from_date"),
    "to_date":filters.get("to_date")
}

if filters.get("supplier"):
    conditions.append("pi.supplier=%(supplier)s")
    params["supplier"]=filters.get("supplier")

if filters.get("supplier_group"):
    conditions.append("s.supplier_group=%(supplier_group)s")
    params["supplier_group"]=filters.get("supplier_group")

if filters.get("net_total"):
    conditions.append("ROUND(pi.net_total)=ROUND(%(net_total)s)")
    params["net_total"]=filters.get("net_total")

if filters.get("tax_amount"):
    conditions.append("ROUND(pi.total_taxes_and_charges)=ROUND(%(tax_amount)s)")
    params["tax_amount"]=filters.get("tax_amount")

if filters.get("grand_total"):
    conditions.append("ROUND(pi.grand_total)=ROUND(%(grand_total)s)")
    params["grand_total"]=filters.get("grand_total")

data=frappe.db.sql(f"""
SELECT
    pi.name purchase_invoice,
    pi.posting_date,
    pi.supplier,
    s.supplier_group,
    pi.net_total,
    pi.total_taxes_and_charges tax_amount,
    pi.grand_total
FROM `tabPurchase Invoice` pi
LEFT JOIN `tabSupplier` s
    ON s.name=pi.supplier
WHERE {' AND '.join(conditions)}
ORDER BY pi.posting_date DESC,pi.name DESC
""",params,as_dict=True)

report_summary=[
{"label":"Net Total","value":sum(d.net_total for d in data),"datatype":"Currency"},
{"label":"Tax Amount","value":sum(d.tax_amount for d in data),"datatype":"Currency"},
{"label":"Grand Total","value":sum(d.grand_total for d in data),"datatype":"Currency"}
]

data=(columns,data,None,None,report_summary,1)
